name: Braciole I
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the steak into 4-6 pieces.
2. Pound each piece to flatten very thin.
3. Place a slice of mozzarella and a pat of butter on each piece.
4. Sprinkle Parmesan, chopped garlic, salt, and pepper over the mozzarella and butter.
5. Roll up each piece tightly and secure with string.
6. Heat olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
7. Add the steak rolls to the skillet and cook until browned on all sides.
8. Remove the steak rolls from the skillet and set aside.
9. Pour your favorite tomato sauce into the skillet and simmer for 1 1/2 hours, or until fork-tender.
10. Return the steak rolls to the skillet with the sauce.
11. Simmer for a few more minutes.
12. Remove the skillet from heat and carefully remove the strings.
13. Serve hot with your favorite pasta.
